title: Thaumic Tweaker
description: Changing Thaumcraft + addons recipes to be more balanced
body:
# Info
This is my attempt at rebalancing Thaumcraft progression, because I thought it was a little unbalanced with players being able to get all the way to void metal gear within one day of playing.

# Features

All of these mods except Thaumcraft are optional

### Recipe changes: 
- Thaumcraft
- Thaumic Augmentation
- Thaumic Additions: Reconstructed
  
### New Items:
- Greatwood Stick 
  
# Changelist

<details>
<summary>How to read the changelist</summary>

Each of the items listed will tell you what was added on. (+ = new), (no + = changed), (- = removed)

Ex: Iron Ingot -> 10 Potentia, +5 Ignis- This means that 10 Potentia was added on to the existing Potentia and 5 Ignis was added to the recipe

</details>



## Thaumcraft

<details>
<summary>Alchemy</summary>
  
- Alumentum -> 10 Potentia, 5 Ignis
- Brass Ingot -> +5 Terra
- Void Ingot -> +5 Perditio
- Hedge Tallow -> 3 Ignis
- Hedge Leather -> 2 Aer, 2 Bestia 
- Basic Focus -> -5 Vitreus, 5 Praecantatio
- Ore Purification -> -3 Metallum, -3 Ordo
- Liquid Death -> -50 Mortuus, -25 Perditio
- Bottled Taint -> 10 Aqua
- Purifying Bath Salts -> -10 Cognitio, -10 Ordo, 20 Victus
- Sanity Soap -> 5 Cognitio, -25 Alienis, 5 Ordo, 10 Victus
- Everfull Urn -> -15 Aqua, -5 Fabrico
</details>


<details>
<summary>Arcane</summary>
  
- Simple Arcane Mechanism -> 1 Ignis, -1 Stick, +1 Greatwood Stick 
- Complex Arcane Mechanism -> 4 Ignis, 1 Aqua, -1 Simple Arcane Mechanism, -1 Stick, +1 Greatwood Plank
- Vis Resonator -> 1 Quartz
- Sanity Checker -> 1 Ordo, 2 Brass Nuggets, -1 Zombie Brain
- Workbench Charger -> -100 vis
- Focal Manipulator -> -25 vis, 1 Terra
- Casters Gauntlet -> -1 Thaumometer, +1 Iron Bars
- Goggles of Revealing -> -1 Brass Ingot
- Mirrored Glass -> 1 Ordo, 1 Quicksilver
- Essentia Tube -> -1 Glass Block, +1 Glass Pane
- Void Jar -> -25 vis, 1 Perditio 
- Thaumcraft Banner -> 2 Greatwood Planks
- Arcane Lamp -> 3 Ignis
- Arcane Levitator -> -2 Planks, +2 Planks Slab
- Infusion Matrix -> +4 Diamonds
- Infusion Speed -> -250 vis
- Infusion Cost -> -250 vis
- Arcane Pedestal -> +2 Ignis 
- Ancient Pedestal -> +2 Ignis
- Eldritch Pedestal -> +2 Ignis
- Focus Pouch -> -1 Gold Ingot, +1 Diamond
- Hungry Chest -> +1 Chest
- Morphic Resonator -> -1 Glass Pane, +1 Rare Earths
- Arcane Alembic -> +1 Terra
- Essentia Smeltery -> -2 Cobblestone, 2 Brass Plates
- Alchemical Construct -> -1 Simple Arcane Mechanism, +1 Brass Plate
- Grapple Gun Spool -> -1 String, +1 Brass Plate
- Grapple Gun -> -1 Plank, +1 Greatwood Log
- Flux Condenser Lattice -> -4 Quartz
- Redstone Inlay -> +2 Ignis
</details>


<details>
<summary>Normal</summary>

- Thaumium Tools -> Sticks to Greatwood Sticks
- Void Tools -> Sticks to Greatwood Sticks
- Bauble Amulet -> 2 String
</details>


<details>
<summary>Infusion</summary>

- Crystal Clusters -> -5 Vitreus, -5 Vinculum 
- Advanced Focus -> 25 Praecantatio, -1 Ender Pearl, +1 Eye of Ender
- Vis Amulet -> 50 Auram, 100 Potentia, 50 Vacuos 
- Runic Shielding -> Increased Cost and Scaling Increased
- Magic Mirror -> 25 Motus, -15 Tenebrae, -1 Gold Ingots, +1 Thaumium Plate
- Magic Hand Mirror -> 25 Motus, -1 Stick, +1 Greatwood Stick
- Essentia Mirror -> 50 Motus
- Axe of the Stream -> 60 Aqua, 30 Herba
- Pickaxe of the Core -> 30 Ignis, 30 Metallum
- Sword of the Zephyr -> 30 Aer, 30 Motus
- Shovel of the Earthmover -> 60 Terra, 30 Fabrico
- Hoe of Growth -> 30 Ordo
- Burrowing Infusion Enchantment -> +50 Instrumentum 
- Collector Infusion Enchantment -> 40 Desiderium, +75 Vacuos
- Destructive Infusion Enchantment -> +75 Instrumentum 
- Refining Infusion Enchantment ->  -40 Ordo, +80 Metallum
- Sounding Infusion Enchantment -> 40 Sensus, +50 Lux
- Arcing Infusion Enchantment -> +70 Aversio
- Essence Infusion Enchantment -> +30 Praecantatio
- Lamplight Infusion Enchantment ->  +25 Praecantatio
- Boots of the Traveler -> -25 Volatus, -25 Motus, +25 Fabrico
- Lamp of Growth -> 10 Herba
- Lamp of Fertility -> -15 Desiderium
- Thaumium Fortress Helm -> -25 Metallum, -5 Praemunio, -10 Potentia, -1 Thaumium Plate
- Thaumium Fortress Chest -> -25 Metallum, -10 Praemunio, -10 Potentia, -1 Thaumium Plate
- Thaumium Fortress Legs -> -25 Metallum, -10 Praemunio, -10 Potentia, -1 Thaumium Plate
- Void Robe Armor -> Requres Thaumium Fortress, Made much more expensive (Has integration with Thaumic Augmentation if installed)
- Thaumium Fortress Masks -> All essentia costs halved
- Primal Crusher -> 75 Terra, 75 Instrumentum, 50 Perditio, 50 Vacuos, 50 Aversio, 100 Desiderium
- Cloudstepper Ring -> +25 Potentia, +10 Praecantatio
- Band of Curiosity -> -100 Cognitio, -25 Vacuos, -25 Vinculum, -2 Book and Quill, -2 Emeralds
- Causality Collapser -> -25 Alienis, -25 Vitium, -1 TNT, -1 Alumentum, -1 Nitor
- Void Syphon -> 50 Alienis, 50 Perditio, 100 Vacuos, 50 Fabrico, +100 Vitium
- Voidseers Pearl -> Half essentia costs
</details>

## Thaumic Augmentation

<details>
<summary>Alchemy</summary>

- Impetus Jewel -> 15 Potentia
</details>


<details>
<summary>Infusion</summary>

- Thaumium Robes Legs -> 5 Metallum, 10 Potentia, 5 Auram

</details>

## Thaumic Additions

<summary>Alchemy</summary>

- Mithrillium Resonator -> -1 Complex Mechanism, -1 Mithrillium Plate
- Mithminite Scythe -> -1 Mithminite Plate

- Void Hoe of Growth -> -100 Victus, +200 Metallum
- Void Shovel of the Earthmover -> -100 Fabrico, -70 Terra, +200 Metallum
- Void Axe of the Stream -> -100 Aqua, -150 Herba, +200 Metallum

- Void Seed -> -50 Tenebrae, -5 Caeles, -2 Void Seeds, -1 Void Metal Block
- Shadow Enchanter -> -20 Aer, -20 Terra, -20 Ignis, -20 Aqua, -20 Ordo, -20 Perditio, -200 Cognitio
- Shadow Beam Staff -> -300 Alienis
